# EstateWise Frontend

> EstateWise Frontend is a Next.js web application for real-estate discovery and analysis, including AI chat, market insights, maps, dashboards, and community forums.

This file curates the highest-value routes for LLM inference and agent discovery.
Prioritize the Core Experience section first for most user questions.
Some routes require authentication (for example profile and parts of community interactions).
Markdown mirrors (`.md`) are not currently published for all pages, so use these canonical URLs directly.

## Core Experience

- [Home](https://estatewise.vercel.app/): Main landing page and entry point for product navigation.
- [AI Chat](https://estatewise.vercel.app/chat): Conversational assistant for property and market questions with streamed responses.
- [Insights](https://estatewise.vercel.app/insights): Analytics, charts, and decision-support views for real-estate exploration.
- [Market Pulse](https://estatewise.vercel.app/market-pulse): Market trend snapshots and pulse-style dashboard views.
- [Map](https://estatewise.vercel.app/map): Geographic property browsing and map-first discovery.
- [Charts](https://estatewise.vercel.app/charts): Data visualization-focused exploration.
- [Forums](https://estatewise.vercel.app/forums): Community posts and discussion hub.

## Platform and Integration Endpoints

- [tRPC API Endpoint](https://estatewise.vercel.app/api/trpc): Frontend-hosted typed API endpoint used by insights data workflows.
- [Sitemap](https://estatewise.vercel.app/sitemap.xml): Full crawl-oriented route listing and change metadata.
- [Frontend Project README](https://github.com/davidnguyen060899/EstateWise-Chatbot/blob/main/frontend/README.md): Architecture and route-level implementation notes for developers and tooling.

## Account and Policies

- [Login](https://estatewise.vercel.app/login): User sign-in flow.
- [Sign Up](https://estatewise.vercel.app/signup): Account registration flow.
- [Reset Password](https://estatewise.vercel.app/reset-password): Password recovery flow.
- [Profile](https://estatewise.vercel.app/profile): Authenticated user profile and account settings.
- [Terms](https://estatewise.vercel.app/terms): Terms of service.
- [Privacy](https://estatewise.vercel.app/privacy): Privacy policy and data handling details.

## Optional

- [Analyzer](https://estatewise.vercel.app/analyzer): Extended analysis interface; secondary to core chat/insights flows.
